message_text: No. I will not pay and I reject the final option.
Understood. What is your current monthly income range?
I’m unemployed and I’m not giving you income details or agreeing to pay.
Understood. I only need one routing detail: when do you expect any income or funds to be available?
I’m not giving you any dates or committing to pay.
